methods.name: wbmailing.models.mails.Mail.get_mailmessage
documentation:
Get a set of parameters and returns the custom mail message alternative

Args:
    rendered_subject (str): The mail subject
    rendered_body (str): Mail Body
    from_email (str): from email address
    to (list<string>): List of destination addresses
    bcc (list<string>): List of BCC addressses
    cc (list<string>): List of CC addresses
    attachments (list<File>): List of File to attach to the mail
    mass_mail (MassMail): The originating mass mail, None if a direct mail
    mail (Mail): The Mail object in case of a resend

inner_classes.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.CREATED
documentation: Default Type

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.QUEUED
documentation: the ESP has accepted the message and will try to send it (possibly later)

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.SENT
documentation: the ESP has sent the message (though it may or may not get delivered)

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.REJECTED
documentation: the ESP refused to send the messsage (e.g., suppression list, policy, invalid email)

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.FAILED
documentation: the ESP was unable to send the message (e.g., template rendering error)

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.BOUNCED
documentation: rejected or blocked by receiving MTA

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.DEFERRED
documentation: delayed by receiving MTA; should be followed by a later BOUNCED or DELIVERED

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.DELIVERED
documentation: accepted by receiving MTA

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.AUTORESPONDED
documentation: a bot replied

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.OPENED
documentation: open tracking

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.CLICKED
documentation: click tracking

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.COMPLAINED
documentation: recipient reported as spam (e.g., through feedback loop)

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.UNSUBSCRIBED
documentation: recipient attempted to unsubscribe

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.SUBSCRIBED
documentation: signed up for mailing list through ESP-hosted form

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.INBOUND
documentation: received message

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.EventType.UNKNOWN
documentation: anything else
Constants for normalized Anymail event types

inner_classes.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.RejectReason

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.RejectReason.INVALID
documentation: bad address format

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.RejectReason.BOUNCED
documentation: (previous) bounce from recipient

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.RejectReason.TIMED_OUT
documentation: (previous) repeated failed delivery attempts

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.RejectReason.BLOCKED
documentation: ESP policy suppression

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.RejectReason.SPAM
documentation: (previous) spam complaint from recipient

class_variables.name: wbmailing.models.mails.MailEvent.RejectReason.UNSUBSCRIBED
documentation: (previous) unsubscribe request from recipient
Constants for normalized Anymail reject/drop reasons

methods.name: wbmailing.tests.test_viewsets.TestSpecificViewsets.test_sendtestmail
documentation: @pytest.mark.parametrize("mvs", [(MassMailModelViewSet)])
def test_get_messages(self, mvs, mass_mail_factory, mail_factory, mail_event_factory, user):
request = APIRequestFactory().get("")
request.user = user
obj = mass_mail_factory(status = MassMail.Status.SENT)
qs = mvs().get_queryset()
mail = mail_factory(mass_mail=qs[0])
me = mail_event_factory(mail = mail, event_type=MailEvent.EventType.CLICKED)
msg = mvs().get_messages(request, instance=qs[0])
assert msg
